description: Dealer Licensing — processes new and renewal dealer license applications, validates bond, lot, and insurance requirements

hard_stops.label: Surety Bond Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Dealer surety bond amount is below the state-mandated minimum — cannot issue dealer license without adequate bond

hard_stops.label: Lot Inspection Failed
hard_stops.logic: Dealer lot failed physical inspection — must meet zoning, signage, office, and display area requirements

hard_stops.label: Principal Has Felony Conviction
hard_stops.logic: A principal or officer of the dealership has a disqualifying felony conviction per state dealer licensing statute

soft_flags.label: Consumer Complaints on File
soft_flags.logic: Dealer has 3 or more unresolved consumer complaints — may require additional oversight or conditions on license

soft_flags.label: License Renewal Overdue
soft_flags.logic: Dealer license has been expired for more than 60 days — reinstatement fees and re-inspection may apply
